title: DNL Arcade
description: A retro-themed arcade built as a set of independent Next.js Multi-Zone apps composed through routing and managed as a Turborepo monorepo — a gateway lobby, an isolated game engine sandbox, and a Postgres-backed high-score leaderboard.
note: Actively in progress — Matrix Breach is playable; Neon Snake, SoundWave, and ComboBreaker are still stubs.
highlights: Multi-Zone architecture: a lobby shell reverse-proxies via Next.js rewrites
Matrix Breach hacking-terminal game live, with a shared score-client package handling leaderboard submission and player identity across zones
Feature-Sliced Design layers with domain logic modeled DDD-style as plain TypeScript entities
